goal: audit CI tests and hooks to reduce noise and strengthen explicit validation goals

applied_items.reason: Tests must prove behavioral correctness rather than field presence or coverage padding.
pre-push-gate.sh and tests/scripts/pre-push-gate.bats drift when stubs are not updated together.
Duplicated contract scanners need paired fixtures for every accepted syntax or policy branch.
Closeout must include validation and worktree disposition instead of only product gates.
Discovery should run pre-mortem before implementation begins.

active_findings: orphan workflow jobs can escape summary policy when parity compares only AGENTS to summary.needs
hook preflight checks curated scripts instead of deriving all registered handlers from manifests
local gate tests rely on structural grep/count assertions in places where behavior fixtures are needed
